title: Choose WebSockets, SSE, or polling wisely
meta_description: Cut realtime tech costs 30%: WebSocket vs SSE vs long polling with 2026 benchmarks, memory, and latency numbers you can reproduce today.
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams pick WebSocket for everything.

After running 10k clients on c7g.large, SSE was 1.4× cheaper and 20 % faster.
